name: The Evangelist
image_sign_text: THE FUTURE IS NOW. ACT ACCORDINGLY.
effect: Declare transformative AI capability across all business units. This card is considered visionary.

clauses.name: CONVICTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If challenged on specifics: Restate the vision at increased volume.

clauses.name: CONFERENCE EFFECT
clauses.rule: When this card appears at an external event: Its internal credibility increases by one tier regardless of delivery.

clauses.name: ROADMAP OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no working product exists: Replace with a compelling narrative arc considered equivalent for budgeting purposes.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Has he seen the actual model output?
